name: IMA All-in-One AI Creator — Image, Video, Music, TTS Generation
tagline: All-in-one AI creation: image, video, music, and TTS with GPT Image 2, SeeDream, Midjourney, Nano Banana, Wan, Kling, Veo, Sora, Suno, DouBao, seed-tts.
description: All-in-one AI content creation tool combining image generator, video generator, music generator, and TTS in a single skill. Image generation with GPT Image 2, SeeDream 4.5, Midjourney, Nano Banana 2/Pro. Video generation with Wan 2.6, Kling O1/2.6, Google Veo 3.1, Sora 2 Pro, Pixverse V5.5, Hailuo, SeeDance, Vidu. Music generation with Suno and DouBao. Text-to-speech with seed-tts-2.0. Supports text-to-image, image-to-image, text-to-video, image-to-video, first-last-frame, reference-image, text-to-music, and text-to-speech through one public skill entry, plus confirmed multi-output workflow plan/run flows.
credentialNotice: The IMA API key is required for API calls, but not before installation. The runtime prefers --api-key or IMA_API_KEY, stores bootstrap credentials in the system keyring, and keeps only keyring metadata in ~/.openclaw/memory/ima_bootstrap.json. It is sent to api.imastudio.com (generation) and, for image/video/audio tasks with local files, to imapi.liveme.com (upload). Both are IMA Studio. Obtain keys at https://www.imaclaw.ai/. Use a scoped/test key for initial testing.

requires.credentialNote: IMA_API_KEY is required for API calls, but not before installation. The runtime prefers environment injection, stores bootstrap credentials in the system keyring, and keeps only keyring metadata in ~/.openclaw/memory/ima_bootstrap.json.

localPaths.purpose: Bootstrap keyring metadata, preferences (model defaults), workflow artifacts/history, and generation logs; logs auto-deleted after 7 days. User can delete anytime.

persistence.retention: Logs are auto-cleaned after 7 days; bootstrap keyring metadata, preferences, and workflow artifacts remain until user deletes them.

use_cases: Image, video, music, TTS in one entry
Multimodal content creation and confirmed workflow execution from one installed skill
Character consistency across image and video
Product demos, explainer videos, marketing materials
Plan and run full creative pipelines as confirmed sequential steps
key_features: Image, video, music, TTS one-stop access with public single-task and workflow CLI surfaces
Beginner positional-prompt mode plus local workflow inventory via --list-workflows
GPT Image 2, SeeDream, Midjourney, Nano Banana, Wan, Kling, Veo, Sora, Suno, DouBao, seed-tts
Runtime model discovery and smart defaults
Better alternative to installing separate image, video, music, and TTS skills
